nl_query: Count the number of faculty_course_mapping entries per academic year.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.academic_year, COUNT(fcm.id) AS faculty_course_mapping_count
FROM   faculty_course_mapping fcm
JOIN   academic_unit         au  ON au.id = fcm.course_id
GROUP  BY au.academic_year
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: academic_unit does NOT have academic_year. academic_year is on exam_schedule_cache and faculty_course_mapping.
